leadText: Fried Fillet (Japanese: きりみフライ Fillet Fry) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V When used in a sandwich, this very salty and bitter ingredient is at its best paired with sour seasonings.
